agreement_summary: Agree on all forced-rule cases (Wikipedia, Utah lecture). Disagree on 2 non-forced agent-judgment hits (2604.07798, 2512.12686) where 07_hit_miss promoted overlap=0 results to hits via paraphrase reasoning rather than substring evidence. My total: 4 hits vs theirs 6. Substantive LLM-consolidation prior art still confirmed (2510.08203, 2601.02845); novelty claim that exact Ostwald-ripening framing isn't directly imported remains plausible.
